Class ManaStone

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.items.ManaStone
All Implemented Interfaces:
Item
public final class ManaStone extends Object implements Item
Represents a Mana Stone item. Mana stones are used to generate or store mana and usually conduct energy. Data is loaded from a JSON file.

  • Constructor Summary

    • ManaStone

      public ManaStone(ManaStones manaStones)
      Creates a ManaStone from its type enum.
      Parameters:
      manaStones - the type of stone (e.g., MANASTONE, SMALLMANASTONE).

  • Method Details

    • rotate

      public Item rotate()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Rotates the item 90 degrees clockwise.
      Specified by:
      rotate in interface Item
      Returns:
      the item itself (if mutable) or a new rotated instance (if immutable).

    • size

      public List<Coordinate> size()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the list of coordinates (shape) the item occupies in the inventory grid. This shape changes based on the item's rotation.
      Specified by:
      size in interface Item
      Returns:
      a list of coordinates relative to the item's anchor (0,0).

    • name

      public String name()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the name of the item.
      Specified by:
      name in interface Item
      Returns:
      the name as a String.

    • id

      public UUID id()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the unique identifier of the item instance. Useful for distinguishing identical items.
      Specified by:
      id in interface Item
      Returns:
      the UUID.

    • rarity

      public Rarity rarity()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the rarity of the item (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Legendary, Relic).
      Specified by:
      rarity in interface Item
      Returns:
      the item's rarity.

    • cost

      public Cost cost()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the resource cost to use or equip the item. This can be Energy, Mana, or Gold.
      Specified by:
      cost in interface Item
      Returns:
      the cost object.

    • rotation

      public int rotation()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the current rotation state index (0, 1, 2, or 3). 0 = 0°, 1 = 90°, 2 = 180°, 3 = 270°.
      Specified by:
      rotation in interface Item
      Returns:
      the rotation index.
